attributes.action: Work with the Swiss & partners to help civilians stranded in Doha leave safely.
attributes.additional_details: Civilians from several countries are currently unable to leave Doha due to regional military escalation and airspace disruption. Families are deeply worried about their safety while travel options remain limited. International cooperation between governments can help ensure civilians receive clear information, support, & safe options to leave when conditions allow. We believe the UK Gov should work with partners to help protect civilians and support safe departures once travel becomes possible.
attributes.background: Swiss civilians, my family, are stranded in Doha due to regional military escalation and airspace disruptions. We ask the UK Government to work with Switzerland, Qatar & allies to support diplomatic coordination and evacuation options to help civilians leave safely when travel becomes possible.

rejection.details:
We apologise for the time it has taken us to reach your petition. This is due to a backlog in our processing system.

We believe this issue has now been addressed and will therefore reject your petition.
